name: Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. bacon, fried crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the lettuce and cauliflower into bite-sized pieces.
2. Grate or chop the red onion finely.
3. Cook the bacon until crispy, then crumble it into small pieces.
4. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
5. Add the parmesan cheese and mix well.
6. Pour in the Hellman's Mayo and stir to combine everything evenly.
7. Transfer the salad to an air-tight container and store in the refrigerator.
